Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Oh, I'm so glad there are other people here wearing yukatas.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Um, I don't stand out too much, do I?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I usually don't wear this kind of clothing, so I'm feeling a little uncomfortable...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}I tend to worry too much about what other people think.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}You know, wearing this has made me think. Yukatas are so light and airy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}They're perfect for the humid summers we have here in Japan.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Yukatas look so simple at first glance, but they're actually very elegantly-designed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 3 25 25}Sorry, I guess that's not really what people talk about at a festival, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Let's get something to eat from one of the food stalls.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Excuse me, may I have one order of takoyaki, please?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I threw in an extra one for ya. I hope you and your boyfriend enjoy it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}She gave us an extra piece of takoyaki.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}It's a little too hot for me to eat it whole, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}It tastes just like the takoyaki at Octopia, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Wait a minute... Do you think she's the same person?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Oh, it's actually a hyottoko mask. So it's a man's face, not an animal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}These masks really set the mood for the festival, don't you think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Можете створити гарні спогади, еге? Шанси виглядають добренько — залишилося багато виграшних квитків![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}But I'm not very lucky, so I think you should do it, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Ого! Вам щастить сьогодні! Виграли з першої спроби![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 5 21 0 11}Ого! Вам щастить сьогодні! Виграли з першої спроби![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}...We've been here for quite some time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}We should probably get going. Thank you for today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 156 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}I've actually never had a chance to go to one of these before.[n]{f 1 1}
